overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Spider-Man walking through a bustling Manhattan-style city street. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes by pedestrians, police cars, and various urban architecture on a clear autumn day.

events.description: passes the green subway entrance railing and continues along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past parked cars and pedestrians

entered.detail: teal-colored metal railing structure marking subway stairs
white sign with red text reading 'OUR' and Wi-Fi availability notice
dark colored sedan parked along the curb
large white commercial delivery vehicle with roll-up rear door
stone building with green awnings and number 857 visible

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a city sidewalk next to a subway entrance with distinctive green railings. The character passes parked vehicles including a black sedan and white delivery truck, while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The historic stone building with green awnings lines the right side of the street.

events.description: steps off sidewalk onto crosswalk to cross the street
police cruiser comes into view with officers standing nearby

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while walking past a police car and group of officers

notable_agents.action: police cruiser parked at intersection with officers gathered nearby

entered.detail: classic yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection
white police car with blue lettering and emergency lights
modern building with large 'd mobile' signage on facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as Spider-Man crosses the street. A police cruiser is parked on the left with officers nearby, while a yellow taxi passes through. The d-mobile building becomes visible on the right as the character approaches the opposite corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide avenue with bus stop shelter

events.description: pauses briefly at street corner then continues walking
passes by glass bus stop shelter while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking past a bus stop while pedestrians take photos

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding up phone to take photo of Spider-Man

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus stop shelter with bench seating
tall reflective glass office tower rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man pauses at the corner before continuing across the street, passing a modern glass bus stop shelter. Pedestrians on the sidewalk take photos as the character walks by. The d-mobile building shifts to the left side while modern skyscrapers become visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown avenue with tall commercial buildings

events.description: approaching crosswalk at intersection with traffic lights visible

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the street toward an upcoming intersection

entered.detail: large vertical digital advertising screens on building facades
zebra crossing lines marking pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide downtown avenue flanked by tall commercial buildings and digital billboards. The bus stop and d-mobile building fall behind as Spider-Man approaches a crosswalk at the next intersection, with pedestrians visible crossing ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Spider-Man navigates a bustling city street, transitioning from a historic sidewalk into a wide, modern downtown corridor. It begins with the character walking past a subway entrance with green railings and stone buildings with matching awnings, moving alongside parked sedans and delivery trucks. As the camera reaches a wide urban intersection, the scene opens up to reveal a parked police cruiser and a passing yellow taxi before the character approaches the D-Mobile building. The movement then shifts toward a modern glass bus stop where pedestrians take photos, causing the D-Mobile building to slide to the left as towering skyscrapers emerge in the distance. Finally, the view expands onto a wide downtown avenue flanked by digital billboards and commercial high-rises, moving steadily toward a distant crosswalk filled with pedestrians.
